---
title: "Open Data Regensburg"
description: "Mapping and analysis of public infrastructure in Regensburg: drinking fountains, decorative fountains, and glass recycling containers."
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [R, Open Data, Geospatial]
---

## About

A spatial analysis of open municipal data from Regensburg. Maps the distribution of drinking fountains, ornamental fountains, and glass recycling containers across the city — combining open government datasets with interactive visualizations to support urban planning and public accessibility.

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [QGIS]{.badge-skill} [Open Data]{.badge-skill} [Geospatial]{.badge-skill}
